system.effect: Unleashes the purest power of Light, sweeping away everything in both the spiritual and material world. Creates a great luminous dome that dissolves all within it. Radius 300 feet. Energy Attack Type with Base Damage 350. Anyone receiving any amount of damage must beat a MR Check Difficulty 160 or be joined with the Light and destroyed in body and soul. All except the caster are equally affected.
system.addedEffect: +10 Base Damage and doubles the radius of the spell.
